description: Create a scheduled GitHub Actions workflow named 'Test: validation' that runs every Saturday at 16:00 and can be manually triggered. The workflow uses an ubuntu-latest environment with a matrix strategy for a single 'release' mode. It checks out two repositories, sets up ccache, installs a large set of packages and Python dependencies, configures and compiles two projects (omnetpp and inet) in release mode, and finally runs validation tests for inet.
